updates.title: The Block Update
added: Storage blocks: coal, iron, gold, diamond, emerald, lapis and redstone all pack into blocks in a 3x3 and craft back out, and a coal block fuels a furnace for 80 smelts
Stone bricks in plain, mossy, cracked and chiseled, with slabs and stairs, smelt plain ones to crack them
Carrots and potatoes: plant them, grow them, and zombies rarely drop them, bake potatoes in a furnace for a proper meal
Pumpkins and melons: carve a jack o'lantern, grow stems that sprout their fruit beside them, and slice melons for a snack
Hay bales pack up your wheat and clay pockets smelt into bricks
Ten new flowers, red and brown mushrooms, dead bushes, and mushroom stew with craftable bowls
Wool in fifteen colors! Craft dyes from flowers and bone meal, and beds now take any wool color
Skeletons drop bones, craft them into bone meal to instant-grow crops and saplings
Glass panes, iron bars and cobblestone walls that connect to their neighbors as you build
Trapdoors in all three woods, they swing open on use like gates
Cactus and sugar cane grow in the world and stack three tall, watch the spikes, cactus prickles anyone who touches it and smelts into green dye
Paper, books and bookshelves, the writing desk trio finally exists
Shears! Snip a sheep for one to three wool and the coat grows back, shears also harvest leaves, grass and bushes as the block itself and cut wool and leaves way faster

The world grew in: deserts sprout cactus clusters and dead bushes, sugar cane lines the water, mushrooms hide on forest floors, clay sits under lakes and shores, and wild pumpkin and melon patches turn up if you look around
Every biome now blooms its own flowers, keep an eye out for the rare ones
Stairs can be placed upside down: click the underside of a block or the top half of a face, same as slabs
Stairs bend around corners now, two stairs meeting at a right angle join into a clean L inside and out
Grass spreads! Dirt next to grass turns grassy over time like it should, and grass buried under a block dies back to dirt

PVP is now opt-in: a PVP button sits right on the options screen, both players need it on for hits to land, and after dealing or taking a hit it locks on for 15 seconds so nobody toggles out of losing a fight

New GAMEPLAY page in the options for the VR tweaks: HUD placement lives there now, quick swap (the reach-behind-your-head slot hop) can be turned off if you keep grabbing it mid-swing, and a new swing mining option lets swings chip blocks with no trigger, off by default
Held torches light your way now, the most asked-for thing on the Discord: carry one and a warm glow follows your hand, and you can see other torch carriers glowing too
Crouching! Duck for real in VR or hold the desktop sneak key, you move at mc sneak speed and a little silhouette at the left end of the hotbar shows whether you are standing or down
The spawn area is a pvp safe zone in both directions, so nobody camps fresh spawns
Avatar size no longer matters in a fight: everyone shares the same fixed mc player hitbox and avatar height is clamped, going tiny or giant buys nothing
fixed: Double doors hang properly: the right-hand door mirrors its art so the handles meet in the middle and both doors swing apart instead of opening the same way
Arrows, books, shears and the offset flint and steel shapes were uncraftable, the recipe matcher never lined their shapes up, all of them craft now

Three world save bugs from your reports are gone: chopped trees and picked flowers stay gone after a reload, rejoining while a friend kept your world open no longer rolls your save back, and water flowing onto lava finally makes obsidian in public worlds
Tall avatars stopped suffocating while jumping through caves, the head check now sits at proper mc height and brushing a wall mid-jump gets a short grace window

Sugar cane and cactus no longer sound like stone to dig: cane digs like grass, cactus like cloth, and mushrooms, dead bushes, pumpkins, jack o'lanterns, melons and every crop got their proper sounds too
Sugar cane's mining hitbox is the actual reed instead of the whole block, so you can aim past it at what's behind
The EDITS and MASTER readouts moved up under the options title, they were crowding the bottom row of buttons

updates.title: Codes Keep Your Stuff
removed: The chat box is gone. Some people used hacked clients to spam and impersonate players in it, so it had to go. Death, join and leave messages still show, and those can no longer be faked or carry made up text
fixed: World codes now carry your chest and furnace items, so importing a code brings everything back instead of empty chests. Codes made before this update only contain blocks, re-export your worlds to protect your items
Lava flows downward properly now instead of stopping one block under the source
Beds model and textures are fixed.

updates.title: Chat For Everyone
added: Chat speaks every language now: Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Cyrillic and more render properly in messages, names and join messages instead of vanishing
The MASTER name on the lobby board and options screen shows every language too
Early beta testers from the thanks board got their own amber BETA TESTER tag, wear it proud
The tag menu shows each tag in its real colors so you can see what you are picking, and it sizes itself to your collection
fixed: Tags behave now: your pick saves between visits, applies reliably instead of sometimes snapping to a different tag you own, and late joiners see the right one

updates.title: Room To Build
changed: World edit limit raised from 20,000 to 150,000 blocks, build over seven times bigger
Big worlds stream to joining players in pieces instead of one giant blob, so a maxed out world loads in clean
World tidying and autosaves spread their work across frames, no more hitching in huge worlds
The block and item numbering got a lot more room under the hood, future updates can add hundreds of new blocks without breaking old lobbies
Your existing saves and world share codes carry over untouched
Truly enormous worlds that outgrow VRChat's save storage keep as much as fits and say so in the log, nothing disappears silently

updates.title: Polish Pass
changed: Menus and HUD text render sharper, especially in VR
Tearing your own builds back down gives the world edit budget back
When the edit budget fills up the world now tidies itself on the spot instead of blocking building
fixed: No more spawning in the ocean, the spawn search finds dry land properly now
Health and armor bars above players no longer show through walls
Options menu buttons no longer overlap

updates.title: Spawn Protection & The Journal Diet
added: Spawn protection! Blocks can't be placed or broken within 10 blocks of the world spawn, so no more lava traps and clutter where everyone drops in
EDITS counter in the settings menu shows how much of the world edit budget is used
changed: Double chests got a proper facelift, split lids, no stretched planks, and the latch shades right from every angle
The VR chat box moved to the right so it sits above the hotbar instead of covering it
The public world moved closer to the map center so far out builds are less jittery
Flowing water and lava no longer count against the world edit limit, only the placed source block does
Trees grown from saplings now count as one edit instead of about sixty
Opening and closing doors no longer bloats your world save
Fires that burn out over open ground clean their edits up completely
Old saves shed their water and fire bloat automatically the next time the world tidies itself
fixed: Item duping is dead: spamming items in and out of chests, shift-click racing, and two players grabbing the same stack all conserve items properly now
Chest and furnace items could vanish from your save when reloading your world, they stick properly now
Big builds near water or with lots of farmed trees were eating the edit budget way faster than they should
Staff tag toggle applies instantly instead of lagging behind

updates.title: Old World Rescue
changed: The old world button now restores your old private world directly as your save in one click, no more copying a code that could get lost
fixed: Exporting your old world could lose it forever if the code never made it to your clipboard, that whole flow is gone

updates.title: One Public World
added: This changelog board! Patch notes now update live without a world update
Old private worlds can come back: hit RESTORE OLD WORLD under IMPORT/EXPORT to make yours the live save again
changed: The game is one shared public world now, private code lobbies are gone
Everyone gets one saved world, loadable as the public world by the instance master
World edit limit doubled from 10,000 to 20,000 blocks, big builds keep going
The world lobbies board got a cleaner single column layout

updates.title: Spiders
added: Spiders! They come out at night, they climb, they pounce, and they drop string, so bows are finally craftable
Mixed version lobbies work now, blocks from newer versions show as placeholders instead of breaking everything, and chat warns you when a lobby is outdated
fixed: Dying no longer sends you into an uncontrollable spin
Same spin fix while floating during world load

updates.title: Armor & Furnaces
added: Armor now shows on the health bars above other players' heads
fixed: Furnace contents were getting wiped when you left the world or respawned, they save with the world now like chests

updates.title: Mutton
added: Sheep drop 1-2 raw mutton along with their wool, cook it in a furnace for a proper meal

updates.title: We're Live!
added: Minecraft VRChat Edition is out of beta and live on VRChat!
Full survival loop: punch trees, craft tools, mine to diamond, build anything
Mobs spawn at night, craft armor to soften the hits
Buckets: scoop water and lava, milk cows, fuel furnaces with lava
Chests and furnaces dump their contents when broken instead of eating them
Dropped items merge into stacks on the ground
Share whole worlds with friends as import/export codes
changed: Everyone starts fresh, earn your first tools the honest way
